description.ru: Общие transport, authentication, CSRF, session/device metadata и error conventions.
description.en: Shared transport, authentication, CSRF, session/device metadata and error conventions.

ru: HTTPS обязателен вне development; обычные REST payloads используют JSON.
Browser mutations требуют HttpOnly session, matching Origin и X-Nexora-CSRF.
Device inventory формируется из server-owned active sessions; client metadata не является authority.
Responses возвращают requestId; errors имеют stable code/message и безопасные details.
en: HTTPS is required outside development; ordinary REST payloads use JSON.
Browser mutations require an HttpOnly session, matching Origin and X-Nexora-CSRF.
Device inventory is derived from server-owned active sessions; client metadata is not authoritative.
Responses return requestId; errors use stable code/message and safe details.

text.ru: Portal CI извлекает method/path/source из текущих route declarations. Payloads дополнительно проверяются runtime validation и tests.
text.en: Portal CI extracts method/path/source from current route declarations. Payloads are additionally enforced by runtime validation and tests.

description.ru: Auth, devices, sync, rooms, ordinary messages, moderation, integrations, Pulse и operations.
description.en: Auth, devices, sync, rooms, ordinary messages, moderation, integrations, Pulse and operations.

rows.ru: Session ownership, current-device conflict, realtime revoke
rows.en: Session ownership, current-device conflict, realtime revoke

rows.ru: Access, room policy, MIME, quota, slow/read-only mode
rows.en: Access, room policy, MIME, quota, slow/read-only mode

ru: Apply room policy and runtime input schema.
Write audit/system event and publish only authorised realtime payloads.
en: Apply room policy and runtime input schema.
Write audit/system event and publish only authorised realtime payloads.

description.ru: Retired API v4 boundary: schema 8 metadata/ciphertext сохраняются, новые writes запрещены.
description.en: Retired API v4 boundary: schema 8 metadata/ciphertext is preserved and new writes are forbidden.

rows.ru: Доступные legacy conversations и immutable state
rows.en: Accessible legacy conversations and immutable state

ru: Server не расшифровывает legacy ciphertext и не преобразует его в ordinary message text.
Client viewer не содержит composer, upload, recording, edit или delete controls.
MLS Socket.IO mutations получают terminal LEGACY_READ_ONLY acknowledgement.
Trust/MLS runtime files и ts-mls отсутствуют в package tree.
en: The Server never decrypts legacy ciphertext or converts it into ordinary message text.
The Client viewer contains no composer, upload, recording, edit or delete controls.
MLS Socket.IO mutations receive a terminal LEGACY_READ_ONLY acknowledgement.
Trust/MLS runtime files and ts-mls are absent from the package tree.

text.ru: Раздел описывает только migration/compatibility boundary. Он не обещает новые encrypted messages, devices, KeyPackages, commits или Welcome recovery.
text.en: This section documents only the migration/compatibility boundary. It does not promise new encrypted messages, devices, KeyPackages, commits or Welcome recovery.

description.ru: Realtime domains, access changes, device revocation и generated event inventory.
description.en: Realtime domains, access changes, device revocation and generated event inventory.

ru: User/room subscriptions создаются только после authenticated bootstrap.
Room access changes немедленно удаляют stale socket subscriptions.
Remote session revoke отправляет session.revoked и отключает target session room.
Events имеют domain type и payload; reducers применяют sequence/idempotency rules.
Sensitive/private state не помещается в general broadcast payload.
en: User/room subscriptions are created only after authenticated bootstrap.
Room access changes immediately remove stale socket subscriptions.
Remote session revoke emits session.revoked and disconnects the target session room.
Events have domain type and payload; reducers apply sequence/idempotency rules.
Sensitive/private state is never placed in a general broadcast payload.

text.ru: Generated inventory показывает фактические on/once/emit names и source lines, найденные во время Pages build.
text.en: The generated inventory shows actual on/once/emit names and source lines discovered during the Pages build.

description.ru: Стабильные классы отказов для Client, integrations и operations.
description.en: Stable failure classes for Client, integrations and operations.

rows.ru: Resource отсутствует или скрыт access policy
rows.en: Resource absent or hidden by access policy

rows.ru: Проверка данных или backup не пройдена

text.ru: UI различает auth, permission, resource, validation, conflict, ban, rate-limit, upload, legacy read-only и temporary errors; unknown internal details не показываются пользователю.
text.en: The UI distinguishes authentication, permission, resource, validation, conflict, ban, rate-limit, upload, legacy read-only and temporary errors; unknown internal details are not shown to users.
